title: Carnitas Tacos with Pineapple Salsa
description: A twist on traditional carnitas, these tacos are filled with tender pork, crispy pineapple salsa, and fresh cilantro.
instructions: 2. In a large Dutch oven, combine the pork, lime juice, orange juice, chili powder, cumin, and salt.
3. Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
4. Braise the pork for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender and easily shredded.
5. While the pork is cooking, prepare the pineapple salsa by combining the pineapple, red onion, and jalapeño in a bowl.
6. Season the salsa with salt to taste.
7. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
8. Shred the cooked pork with two forks and season with salt to taste.
9. Assemble the tacos by spooning the pork onto a warmed tortilla and topping with pineapple salsa and cilantro.
